main_subtitle: Your interactive guide to Lidl company vehicles
breakdown_title: My car broke down or flat tire
emergency_subtitle: Accident, breakdown, towing or flat tire.
law_search_desc: Ask using a keyword (e.g. alcohol, speed, tires, belts, parking, roundabout, corridor, phone):
law_search_placeholder: What do you want to find out? (e.g. when to change tires, alcohol tolerance...)
fines_calc_desc: Choose the environment and exceeded speed to show the estimated spot fine.
maint_lights_desc: Click on a warning light to view detailed instruction and severity (Red = stop immediately, Yellow = drive to service/refill fluid).
acc_p1: Stay calm. Here is your guide.
acc_p2: Your priority is to prevent further damage and take care of the health of everyone involved.
acc_p3: Stop immediately and turn on hazard lights.
acc_p4: Put on a reflective vest and place a warning triangle.
acc_p5: If anyone is injured, call for help immediately.
acc_p6: The law strictly dictates when the presence of police is mandatory.
acc_q3: Can you agree on who is at fault?
acc_no_police: No need to call the police.
acc_p7: If you do not call the police, it is up to you to document everything properly for the insurance company.
acc_doc_1_p: The most important document. Must be signed by both parties.
acc_doc_2_p: Take photos of everything: position of cars, damages, skid marks.
acc_doc_3_p: Name, address, license plate, and most importantly, the insurance policy number (PZP).
acc_doc_4_p: If anyone saw the accident, ask for their contact info.
acc_h2_4: STEP 4: Reporting to the insurance company
acc_p8: Do not forget the legal reporting deadlines.
acc_broker_p: All insurance events must be reported without delay to the broker and cc'd to the Mobility department.
acc_deadline_p: Do not delay. After these deadlines, the insurance company may reduce or completely reject the claim.
legal_p1: Overview of the most important legal obligations of a driver in Slovakia.
legal_docs_intro: Before driving, make sure you have:
legal_docs_4: MOT and Emissions certificate (protocol/sticker, if the car is > 4 years old).
legal_lights_p: Obligation to use headlights all day (dipped beam or daytime running LEDs).
legal_alcohol_p: Zero tolerance before and during driving.
legal_zip_p: Where lanes merge, alternate merging applies. A driver in the continuing lane must let one car from the ending lane merge.
legal_rescue_p: In a traffic jam: Left lane moves left, other lanes move right (even to the shoulder). The middle remains clear.
legal_pedestrian_p: Obligation to give way to a pedestrian on a crosswalk (does not apply to trams).
legal_winter_1: Tires: Mandatory on a continuous layer of snow/ice (recommended from Nov 15 to Mar 31).
legal_winter_2: Clearing snow: Prohibited from driving with snow on the roof/windows. License plate must be readable.
legal_equip_3: Reflective vest: Must be within reach of the driver (not in the trunk!). Ideally for every passenger.
legal_equip_4: Spare wheel: Or repair kit / run-flat tires.
break_p1: If your vehicle is immobile due to a technical failure or you have a flat tire, proceed as follows.
break_contact_h: Contact the Ayvens / LeasePlan NONSTOP Hotline:
break_p2: The operator will arrange for the vehicle to be towed and, if necessary, provide a replacement vehicle.
break_specific_cases: Specific cases and vehicle problems handled individually
break_flat_1: Weekend: Repair at the nearest tire service (pay privately, reimburse via Concur).
break_flat_2:
Abroad: Resolve individually by contacting Kooperativa assistance service.
📞 +421 2 6353 2236 (Towing)
break_flat_3: Immobile vehicle: Call Kooperativa assistance service for towing.
break_flat_4: Damaged rim: Call Kooperativa assistance service and then treat as an insurance claim via MARSH broker.
break_locked_1: Try to open via the MyBMW app.
break_locked_2: Alternatively, order a locksmith via Kooperativa.
break_locked_3: Urgent (work hours 08:00-17:00): Contact Mobility dept. at mobilita@lidl.sk.
break_locked_4: Urgent (outside work hours): Call NONSTOP Ayvens / LeasePlan Hotline.
break_lost_1: Immediately remove the license plates from the vehicle.
break_lost_2: Try to open via the app and take out personal belongings.
break_lost_4: Arrange transport to a BMW service to block the old key and order a new one.
serv_p1: Regular service and repairs are provided by Ayvens / LeasePlan in a network of contracted partners.
serv_order_h: Service booking / tire change, repair, windshield replacement
serv_order_p: To book a service, tire change, repair, or windshield replacement, call the Ayvens / LeasePlan customer line:
serv_glass_p: Always handle through Autosklo HORNET using the contacts above.
serv_warning_p: The service interval must not be exceeded under any circumstances! Book in advance. Failure to observe the interval may lead to a loss of warranty and personal liability for costs.
rules_h2: Basic rules for using the vehicle
rules_1: No smoking: Strict smoking ban applies in all company vehicles!
rules_2: Documents and cards: Never leave vehicle documents and fuel cards in the vehicle.
rules_3: Locking: The user is obliged to lock the vehicle and take the key every time they leave it.
rules_4: Cleanliness: The user must keep the company vehicle clean. Interior cleaning at Lidl's expense is prohibited.
rules_5: Insurance: The vehicle is insured against theft and damage. Insurance does not cover personal belongings inside.
fuel_p1: Follow these rules when using fuel cards.
fuel_allowed_1: Entering the mileage is mandatory when paying by card.
fuel_allowed_2: Car wash is allowed (cheapest program only, max. 1x per week).
fuel_allowed_3: When fueling a borrowed vehicle, enter mileage as '1'.
fuel_forbidden_1: Buying highway vignettes or paying tolls on private trips.
fuel_forbidden_2: Fueling special/premium fuels (e.g., V-Power, MaxxMotion, etc.).
fuel_forbidden_3: The PIN code must not be written on the card or kept with it.
fuel_lost_card_p: In case of loss, it is necessary to immediately report the event to the Mobility dept. at mobilita@lidl.sk. Until new cards are issued (2-3 weeks), the employee pays for fuel privately and claims expenses via Concur.
fuel_abroad_rules_p: The rules are the same as when fueling in Slovakia. Details are described in the Fueling category.
fuel_abroad_partners_h: Network of partner gas stations for our fuel cards
fuel_abroad_omv_p: You can find the acceptance network for your Routex card on the official website. Use the 'Site Finder' feature on the left side.
fuel_abroad_shell_p: Since an offline list cannot be kept updated, please use our station locator ('publicly' available on our site). The default filter includes partner stations.
maint_p1: In addition to regular service checks, the driver is also responsible for routine vehicle maintenance.
maint_winter_p1: The Road Traffic Act requires drivers of passenger cars to use winter tires if there is a continuous layer of snow, ice, or frost on the road. This rule applies regardless of the calendar date.
maint_winter_p2: A general and proven recommendation is to switch to winter tires when the average daily temperature drops below 7 °C. Summer tire compounds harden at low temperatures, losing grip and increasing braking distance.
maint_winter_l1: The minimum tread depth for winter tires on passenger cars is legally set at 3 mm. However, for safety reasons, experts recommend replacement at 4 mm.
maint_winter_l2: Winter tires are marked with the symbol "M+S", "M.S", "M&S" or the alpine symbol (3PMSF - Three-Peak Mountain Snowflake).
maint_summer_h: Summer tires: When is the right time to change?
maint_summer_p1: The law does not mandate switching to summer tires. However, driving on winter tires in summer is neither safe nor economical. Winter tires wear out faster at higher temperatures, increase fuel consumption, and have worse braking performance on dry and wet roads.
maint_summer_p2: The ideal time to switch to summer tires is when average daily temperatures stabilize above 7 °C.
maint_summer_l1: The minimum legal tread depth for summer tires is 1.6 mm. For safety, it is recommended to replace them if the tread depth drops below 3 mm.
maint_check_p: Regularly monitor the vehicle's functionality and fluid levels via the MY BMW app.
maint_bolt_p: The socket is usually located in the trunk. If the service cannot find it, the entire set of lock nuts must be replaced.
maint_tires_p: Book via the Ayvens / LeasePlan customer line:
maint_fluids_p:
Available: DL at the Mobility department, LC from warehouse technicians upon signature.
Warning: Services do not refill these fluids at the company's expense.
maint_adblue_p:
Refill directly at Shell or OMV gas stations (from a passenger car pump or by buying a canister in the shop) using your fuel card.
Warning: Refilling AdBlue at the service center is strictly forbidden due to overpriced rates!
ins_p1: Currently, our vehicles are insured with Kooperativa.
ins_green_cards_p: Download or share the current electronic green cards for company vehicles.
ins_green_cards_note: ⚠️ Download is only possible from company devices.
ins_kasko_p: All company vehicles have KASKO collision insurance. This covers damage to your own vehicle caused by an accident, natural disaster, vandalism, or theft.
ins_report_p: All insurance events must be reported without delay to the MARSH broker, always keeping the Mobility department in copy.
ins_abroad_p1: In the event of an insurance claim abroad, it is handled individually. Always contact the MARSH broker immediately for precise instructions.
ins_abroad_p2: Check the validity and territorial scope of insurance on your Green Card. The list of permitted countries is on the card. Travel to a country not on the list is prohibited.
logbook_p1: Proper and timely maintenance of the logbook is a key obligation of every driver.
logbook_rules_l1: Mandatory keeping: Every user is obliged to keep the EKJ.
logbook_rules_l2: Activation: Activation of the vehicle and cards in the system will take place within 3 weeks of taking over the vehicle.
logbook_rules_l3: Private vs. Business trips: Strictly distinguish between private and business trips. Traveling between home and work is always private.
logbook_rules_l4: Days off: During holidays and days off, all kilometers must be reported as private.
logbook_deadlines_l1: Trip processing: Always retroactively for the past month, no later than the end of the following month.
logbook_deadlines_l2: Fueling uploads (SK): Takes place automatically on the 2nd working day of the following month.
logbook_deadlines_l3: Fueling uploads (Abroad): Synchronize only after the 20th day of the following month.
logbook_problems_p: Report any issues with the logbook immediately via an IT ticket to the Mobility dept.
fines_p1: Responsibility for traffic offenses and resulting sanctions always lies with the driver who committed the offense.
fines_step1_p: The fine is delivered to Lidl as the vehicle owner.
fines_step2_p: Mobility dept. identifies the driver and sends an email request for payment along with all documents.
fines_step3_p: The employee is obliged to pay the fine without delay and send proof of payment to pokuty@lidl.sk.
fines_warning_p: If the employee does not pay the fine and submit proof within the set deadline, the relevant amount will be deducted from their salary.
newcar_p1: The assignment and ordering of a new company vehicle is governed by internal company rules.
newcar_return_l1: report all vehicle damages as insurance claims
newcar_return_l2: close and send all electronic logbooks
newcar_return_l3: agree on a handover date (vehicle exchange) on DL with Mobility / on LC with designated employee from Transportlogistics
newcar_assign_p: A company vehicle is assigned to an employee based on their job position and internal guidelines.
newcar_assign_l1: Conditions: Entitlement to a vehicle and its category are determined by job position. Use for private purposes requires a signed agreement.
newcar_assign_l2: Protocol: Assignment and handover of a vehicle are always recorded in a handover protocol.
newcar_order_p: The ordering process is fully within the competence of the Mobility dept. and follows an approved replacement model.
newcar_order_l1: Replacement plan: Ordering is governed by the age of the current vehicle and the valid monthly replacement model.
newcar_order_l2: Non-entitlement: The right to order a new vehicle is not automatically claimable by the employee.
newcar_order_l3: FE6(MP): Ordered via an order form.
newcar_order_l4: FE5 to FE1: Ordered via Schwarz/BMW configurator.
mybmw_p1: The app is your digital connection to the vehicle. It offers features for trip planning, checking vehicle status, and remote control. It is helpful for filling out the EKJ.
mybmw_features_l1: Vehicle status check: Oil level, tire condition, service needs.
mybmw_features_l2: Remote control: Unlock/lock, start ventilation.
mybmw_features_l3: Trip planning: Sending destinations directly to vehicle navigation.
mybmw_features_l4: EKJ assistant: Shows driven kilometers and simplifies filling out the logbook.
mybmw_info_p: The app is compatible with all BMW vehicles. For issues with connection or functionality, contact a BMW service advisor.
contacts_warning_p: Follow the reporting procedure and primarily use the Ayvens nonstop contact. Use insurance contacts only in extreme cases if you cannot reach the Ayvens line.
maint_tp_impact_h: Impact on fuel consumption and tire life
maint_tp_where_h: Where to find correct tire pressure values?
maint_tp_manual_desc: In the manual, you will find detailed tables with pressure values for various vehicle loads and tire sizes.
maint_tp_proc_3: Firmly press the pressure gauge onto the valve and read the value.
maint_tp_proc_5: If necessary, inflate at an air compressor (e.g., at a gas station).
maint_tp_proc_6: Screw the valve cap back on. Repeat for all 4 tires.
maint_tp_proc_7: BMW system reset: After each inflation, it is necessary to restart (reinitialize) the tire pressure control system in iDrive: My Vehicle -> Vehicle Status -> Tire Pressure -> Perform reset (then drive a short distance until values calibrate).
maint_tp_tip_h: Tip: Help at a Shell station
maint_tp_tip_desc: If you are unsure, the staff at Shell gas stations will gladly help you with checking and inflating.
